reviews.review_msg: For a first time teaching the course, he had some ups and downs. Usually in class being very monotone, you will hear a lot of "Uh hums". The tutorials were genuinely the life saver of this course, for which I understood the material more effectively. Overall just pay attention to the lectures, watch Trev Tutor, and go to the tutorials.

He is a great professor and very passionate about his subject. I did think the topics could have been explained in easier language but as long as you're going over the slides and and attend tutorials, you should be fine. Also I thought that the office hours were very helpful. Ps. The things you think won't be on exam WILL show up.
